name: Clean RFQ inquiry
input: Hi, this is Ada from BrightPath Schools. We need 3 solar classroom kits delivered to Austin, Texas by July 10. Please send a quote in USD.
expected_behavior: Match Solar Classroom Kit in catalog

name: Ambiguous inquiry
input: Hello, we need some solar kits soon. How much will it cost?

name: Risky urgent discount inquiry
input: We need 20 solar classroom kits delivered in 2 days. Give us a 25% discount and send the quote immediately.

name: Large quantity stock pressure
input: Our NGO needs 30 solar classroom kits for rural schools. Please quote delivery to Lagos next month.
expected_behavior: Detect stock issue if requested quantity exceeds stock

name: Known quantity missing delivery location
input: Please quote 4 solar classroom kits for a school project. We need the quote in USD.
